title: Can you manually add Holidays that will act similar to weekend days?
excerpt:

posts.author: brianlutt (Brian L)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was wondering if there is a way to manually add holidays into a “master calendar”.

For example, our boards are setup so you can’t set Weekends when defining a timeline. Whenever spanning over a month, it will only consider work days when it looks at the total days a task took.

I’m looking to add holidays to the calendar, so if I span a month that has holidays in it:
1.) It won’t let me start or finish a task on a holiday similar to how it won’t let me start or finish on a weekend.
2.) Total days of a project timeline won’t include holidays just like it doesn’t include weekends.

Thanks for any help!

posts.author: REG_Philip (Philip Gotzen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @brianlutt ,
as far as I know there is no option to at holidays at the moment. I totally support your request though and there already is a similar request in the featuer feedback section Holiday/Blackout days in Timeline/Gantt Views where you can upvote this request.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @brianlutt

Welcome to the Community!

It look like Can you manually add Holidays that will act similar to weekend days? - #2 by REG_Philip post here might have answered your question, is that correct?

If so, please don’t forget to mark it as the solution so other users can easily find it, and to close this thread
If not, feel free to ask any additional questions you have!

Best,
Dani

posts.author: MHaigh (Matthew Haigh)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a separate board where we enter “holidays”, then combine this in the dashboard/workload views so peoples holidays are shown. This “allocates” them to the holiday project, so they are not booked on other work. … it would be beneficial if the users profile could be set with a method for approved holidays.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
